ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model (e.g., Igs, Igd, Igcs, Igcd) */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., global, local) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the model was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the model */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., igcmod, igbmod) */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter (e.g., NMOS, PMOS) */,
  "binnable" TEXT /* Whether the parameter is binnable (Yes/No) */,
  "min_value" TEXT /* Minimum value for the parameter */,
  "max_value" TEXT /* Maximum value for the parameter */,
  "step_value" TEXT /* Step value for the parameter */,
  "is_required" TEXT /* Whether the parameter is required (Yes/No) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the parameter (e.g., integer, float, string) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_parameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design the simulation belongs to */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used for the simulation */,
  "simulation_date" TEXT /* Date the simulation was run */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the simulation */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the simulation */,
  "simulation_type" TEXT /* Type of simulation (e.g., static, dynamic) */,
  "run_time" TEXT /* Run time of the simulation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the simulation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the simulation (e.g., success, failure, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES designs ("design_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "designs" (
  "design_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each design */,
  "design_name" TEXT /* Name of the design */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the design */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the design */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the design was created */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the design */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the design was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the design */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the design (e.g., draft, reviewed, approved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("design_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_designs_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_designs_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, engineer, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "is_active" TEXT /* Whether the user account is active (Yes/No) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the version belongs to */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter the version belongs to */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the version belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "is_current" TEXT /* Whether the version is the current version (Yes/No) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES model_parameters ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
